title: Hands Off, Kotesashi-kun
overview: Koyo is on a mission to take care of five high school girls with his massages and magic hands.

title: What brings you here, Aoba-chan? (1)
overview: Koyo is accused of stealing Aroma's panties. Will his first day as the dorm caretaker be his last?

title: What brings you here, Aoba-chan? (2)
overview: The bedroom battle heats up between Koyo's magic touch and Aoba's seductive tricks. Who will win in the end?

title: Izumi-chan Wants to Quit Swimming (1)
overview: Izumi can't win a swim meet due to severe anxiety. Will Koyo's masterful massage be enough to help her unwind?

title: Izumi-chan Wants to Quit Swimming (2)
overview: Izumi wants to win, no matter what—even if it means letting Koyo massage her in a very private area!

title: Chiyo-chan Can't Take the ****? (1)
overview: Koyo must poke and prod Chiyo's most sensitive area—all so she can win against an online gamer?

title: Chiyo-chan Can't Take the ****? (2)
overview: Chiyo is willing to endure Koyo's near-torture treatment, but will it be too much for her?

title: Miyuki-chan Is Charismatic (1)
overview: Miyuki's brutal training camp pushes her volleyball team to the brink, and only Koyo can save the day!

title: Miyuki-chan Is Charismatic (2)
overview: When Koyo teaches Miyuki how to massage him, he discovers she's good enough to be his rival!

title: Aroma-chan Needs to Rest (1)
overview: Koyo is assigned to look after Aroma after her injury, but is she capable of staying in bed and healing up?

title: Aroma-chan Needs to Rest (2)
overview: Koyo has the cure for Aroma's troubles—but first, he must examine her rear end?

title: Kotesashi-kun's Bust Enhancement Massage Course
overview: Koyo knows the secret to increasing a girl's cup size, but first he must avoid the vice principal's trap!
